name: aic
description: Agent Input Compiler — local-first MCP server for context compilation

scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/dist mcp/dist mcp/integrations && find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -not -path './node_modules/*' -delete && rm -rf coverage .turbo
